content.query:
USE electric_vehicle_ldw
GO

IF OBJECT_ID('silver.vehicle_type') IS NOT NULL
    DROP EXTERNAL TABLE silver.vehicle_type
GO

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE  silver.vehicle_type
WITH
(
    DATA_SOURCE = electric_vehicle_source,
    LOCATION = 'silver/vehicle_type',
    FILE_FORMAT = parquet_file_format
)AS
SELECT vehicleType AS vehicle_type, electric_vehicle_type
    FROM OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'bronze/vehicle_type.json',
        DATA_SOURCE = 'electric_vehicle_source',
        FORMAT = 'CSV',
        FIELDTERMINATOR = '0x0b',
        FIELDQUOTE = '0x0b'
    ) 
    WITH (
        jsonDoc NVARCHAR(MAX)
    ) AS vehicle_type
    CROSS APPLY OPENJSON(jsonDoc)
    WITH(
        vehicleType SMALLINT,   
        electric_vehicle_type VARCHAR(100) '$.electricVehicleType'
    )
GO

SELECT *  FROM silver.vehicle_type
GO
